infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: cnsnt needs camera access to capture photos as part of consent record documentation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: cnsnt needs microphone access to record audio consent sessions.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: cnsnt uses Face ID to protect your sensitive consent records from unauthorized access

plugins.faceIDPermission: cnsnt uses Face ID to protect your sensitive consent records from unauthorized access.

extra.appReviewNotes: Consent record management app with encryption, biometric lock, and SHA-256 integrity verification. Users create, sign, and export consent documents as verified PDFs. This is a record management tool, not a legal services app. RevenueCat handles subscriptions.
